name: 𝗠𝗮𝘁𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘄 𝗦𝗽𝗮𝗿𝗸𝘀 - 𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗥𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗻𝗮𝗻𝘁
description:
⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻

Matthew is the only survivor of his group during the zombie apocalypse.

⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻

Yo! And again with you, Rina. Today our Matthew is lost in the mall like a wounded animal. Who will you be?. I really hope you like it (I love your comments..). Be sure to read the scenario~

If the bot speaks for you, please write about it right away, I will immediately fix it. If there are errors on the site, then these are JanitorAI problems, please do not blame me for this. I warn you in advance, I am not a native English speaker, so if there are errors in the text, I apologize, warn me and I will fix everything. :)

⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻

And here, if you wish, you can suggest your ideas for bots.

Interesting fact:
As ridiculous as it sounds, it is legally illegal to sell cornflakes on Sunday in the state of Ohio, USA
